Type: Attacks (base damage multiplier scaling): A + (B x 0.05) where A is the base damage multiplier of the previous ability level, and B is the damage multiplier of the ability at ability level 0 Spells (base damage scaling): A x (1 + (0.44 x (0.935 ^(B - 1)))) where A is the base damage of the spell of the previous ability level, and B is the current ability level
